scripts.build: cd .. && uv run python -m compileall ml
scripts.etl: cd .. && uv run python -m ml.data.etl --config ml/configs/data/default.yaml --output ml/data/processed
scripts.train: cd .. && uv run python -m ml.models.train --config ml/configs/train/default.yaml --dataset ml/data/processed/dataset.pt --weights ml/models/weights/model.pt
scripts.lint: cd .. && uv run ruff check ml
